reference: Not to worry much, as it is a cyst that has become infected and is prone to getting infected repeatedly. It is a sebaceous cyst and, in the worst case, should be removed by minor surgery to achieve complete relief. To start with, you should apply some local antibiotic solution or take oral antibiotics. All the best!
text: Not to worry much, as it is a cyst that has become infected and is prone to getting infected repeatedly. It is a sebaceous cyst and, in the worst case, should be removed by minor surgery to achieve complete relief. To start with, you should apply some local antibiotic solution, or take oral antibiotics. All the best!
